blockers.description: Ghostty UAF crash when closing last terminal pane next to Preview
blockers.workaround: Prevented by count_terminals guard in close_active

decisions.rationale: Puts both binaries in target/debug/ so which_agent_browser finds it automatically

decisions.decision: SplitNode::Preview container changed from Overlay to Box
decisions.rationale: Needed to accommodate URL bar + overlay layout vertically
Acceptable latency for click events, avoids async channel complexity

next_action: Test mouse click forwarding, then add keyboard input forwarding via EventControllerKey on Picture
context_notes: Post-phase-08 feature work. Phase plans complete. Building interactive browser preview with keybindings, URL bar, viewport sizing, input forwarding. Frame rendering confirmed working. Input forwarding code written but untested.
